productTitle: MikroTik CubeSA 60Pro ac – 60 GHz Sector AP with 5 GHz Backup
name: MikroTik CubeSA 60Pro ac – 60 GHz Sector AP with 5 GHz Backup
title: MikroTik CubeSA 60Pro ac – 60 GHz Sector AP with 5 GHz Backup
title_extended: MikroTik CubeSA 60Pro ac – 60 GHz Sector AP with 5 GHz Backup
short_description: 60 GHz 802.11ay, Gigabit Ethernet, Powerful quad-core CPU, 5 GHz failover, TDMA GPS sync
description: 60 GHz 802.11ay, Gigabit Ethernet, Powerful quad-core CPU, 5 GHz failover, TDMA GPS sync

detailed_description.heading: Next-Gen Connectivity
detailed_description.text: 60 GHz solutions offer fiber-like speed and stability - while saving you plenty of time and money on installation and maintenance. The MikroTik Cube 60Pro series leverages the latest advancements in wireless technology to offer a cost-effective alternative to traditional cabling, combining the power of 60 GHz networking with the convenience of wireless solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Sector Antenna for Expanded Coverage
detailed_description.text: The CubeSA 60Pro ac is equipped with a sector antenna, making it highly effective in point-to-multipoint configurations. Capable of reaching distances around 600 meters, this device excels in managing connectivity for various outdoor events such as live shows, festivals, workshops, construction sites, and temporary medical facilities like pop-up vaccination clinics. For environments that require even greater reach, pairing with devices like the MikroTik nRAY can extend coverage up to 800 meters, providing versatile and expansive network setups.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Hardware
detailed_description.text: The CubeSA 60Pro ac is powered by an ARM 32bit IPQ-4019 CPU, with 4 cores that operating at 716 MHz to efficiently handle network traffic and optimize power consumption. Accompanied by 256 MB of RAM and 64 MB of FLASH storage, the device runs on RouterOS, MikroTik's advanced operating system that provides a wide range of configuration options and features. This combination of hardware and software ensures that the device can manage multiple high-demand applications simultaneously.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and PoE Features
detailed_description.text: The device operates on the 5 GHz frequency band, supporting the 802.11a/n/ac standards with a maximum data rate of 433 Mbit/s. It features a single wireless chain, optimized by an 11.5 dBi antenna gain, ensuring strong and stable signal coverage. The CubeSA 60Pro ac is equipped with the IPQ4019 chip, enabling Wi-Fi 5 technology that is capable of delivering high-speed wireless connectivity with enhanced efficiency.

detailed_description.heading: Additional Features and Value
detailed_description.text: For advanced positioning and time-synchronization applications, the CubeSA 60Pro ac integrates GPS technology, broadening its usability in complex network deployments that require precise location data. It also meets rigorous international standards with certifications from CE, FCC, IC, EAC, and ROHS, ensuring compliance with global regulations for safety and environmental impact.

detailed_description.heading: Durable and Practical Design
detailed_description.text: The CubeSA 60Pro ac has undergone a design upgrade to include a strong metal base, enhancing both the device's mounting options and its cooling efficiency. The compact and unobtrusive cube form-factor is not only practical but also discreet, making it ideal for settings where minimal visual impact is desired. This robust build ensures that the device can withstand rigorous outdoor conditions while maintaining a low profile.

detailed_description.heading: Networking and Power
detailed_description.text: The CubeSA 60Pro ac includes one Gigabit Ethernet port, providing a high-speed wired connection option that complements its wireless capabilities. It supports Power over Ethernet (PoE) with an input voltage range of 18-48 V, compatible with 802.3af/at standards, which simplifies installation by allowing both power and data to be delivered over a single cable. The device's maximum power consumption is only 13 W, emphasizing its energy efficiency.
